text:
Created attachment 256099
[PATCH] textproc/hs-pandoc-crossref: update 0.3.18.0 → 0.3.18.1

0.3.18.1

    Minor refactor to avoid new warnings introduced in GHC 9.8.

    Switch CI compiler to GHC 9.8.4.

    Add some potentially useful references to the documentation.

    Fix image scaling in docx for subfigGrid. See #394 for details.
